rationale: The cited paper appears methodologically central rather than incidental: it develops a joint incidence–quantity–brand-choice multicategory promotion model, while the citing paper’s core empirical approach also jointly models incidence/choice with quantity and uses simulations for promotion timing decisions. The topical overlap in titles and notes (promotion timing coordination, incidence/quantity/choice modeling) suggests plausible use as a theory/method foundation, so this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
